gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t Struct Reference
[mPIPE Ingress and Egress Wrappers]

A convenient interface to a NotifRing, for use by a single thread. More...


Data Fields

gxio_mpipe_context_t * context
 The context.
gxio_mpipe_idesc_t * idescs
 The actual NotifRing.
unsigned long num_entries
 The number of entries.
unsigned long mask_num_entries
 The number of entries minus one.
unsigned long log2_num_entries
 The log2() of the number of entries.
unsigned int head
 The next entry.
unsigned int ring
 The NotifRing id.

Detailed Description

A convenient interface to a NotifRing, for use by a single thread.
Examples:

mpipe/chaining/app.c, mpipe/forward/app.c, mpipe/forward/app_gx8072.c, mpipe/ingress/app.c, mpipe/loopback/app.c, and mpipe/multi_rules/app.c.

Field Documentation

gxio_mpipe_context_t* gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t::context

The context.

gxio_mpipe_idesc_t* gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t::idescs

The actual NotifRing.

unsigned long gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t::num_entries

The number of entries.

unsigned long gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t::mask_num_entries

The number of entries minus one.

unsigned long gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t::log2_num_entries

The log2() of the number of entries.

unsigned int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t::head

The next entry.

unsigned int gxio_mpipe_iqueue_t::ring

The NotifRing id.
